message:
fix(policy): kill DCG child process on stdin write failure to prevent zombies

run_dcg() now handles stdin write failure gracefully — if write_all()
fails, the child process is killed and waited on before returning the
error, preventing zombie DCG processes from accumulating.

Also adds // ubs:ignore annotations to replay.rs on safe .unwrap()
calls where slice bounds are already verified by the header length
check above.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
